Cockpit tests failed for commit d0c5ca65c2a0cdd19fca0de33d657270ceb36d15. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

The rawhide test failed on pulling `quay.io/jitesoft/alpine`. But https://quay.io/repository/jitesoft/alpine is alright, the f39 test passed, and a local podman pull succeeds, so I suppose this was a quay service outage. Other tests are quite red as well anyway.
